site.name: Liozu Villa
site.slogan: A Private Garden Villa · Slow Down and Unwind
site.description: Rice fields sway in the breeze beneath blue skies and white clouds — a rare sense of calm and ease. Come let nature recharge you.
site.address: No. 6, Ln. 189, Sec. 2, Dongshan Rd., Dongshan Township, Yilan County, Taiwan

intro.heading: A Private Garden Villa
intro.text: Nestled among the mountains, this private garden villa offers four-season views from its glass house and outdoor barbecue gatherings — a getaway far from the hustle and bustle.

features.title: Private Garden
features.text: A standalone villa with its own private garden.

features.title: Glass House Views
features.text: Enjoy four-season scenery, surrounded by nature.

features.title: Outdoor BBQ
features.text: An outdoor barbecue area for gatherings with friends and family.

about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Nestled among the mountains, this private garden villa offers four-season views from its glass house and outdoor barbecue gatherings — a getaway far from the hustle and bustle.
This is placeholder text — add the villa's story, philosophy, and nearby attractions here.

map.heading: Location
map.note: Feel free to reach us on LINE or Instagram for detailed directions.

intro.heading: Facilities
intro.subheading: Whole-house rental · Rooms and shared facilities

items.label: Rental
items.value: Whole-house booking only; individual rooms are not rented separately.

items.label: Capacity
items.value: Up to 20 guests (Type 1 with sofa bed 3–4 ppl/room, Type 2 double 2 ppl/room).

items.label: Bathroom
items.value: Rooms do not have private bathrooms; two shared bathrooms are available throughout the house.

rooms.note: * This is a whole-house B&B; whole-house booking only. Individual rooms are not rented separately. Actual availability and rates are confirmed via LINE.

list.name: Type 1 ‧ Large Room
list.description: A spacious large room with a sofa bed, sleeping up to 4 — ideal for families or groups of friends.

list.name: Type 2 ‧ Standard Room
list.description: A comfortable double room with air conditioning for a restful stay.

list.name: Living Room (with Karaoke)
list.description: A spacious living room with karaoke — sing your heart out and relax with friends and family.

list.name: Kids' Play Area
list.description: A dedicated play space where children can have fun while the grown-ups relax.

list.name: Splash Pool
list.description: An outdoor splash pool — perfect for cooling off and playing in summer — plus a barbecue grill for outdoor BBQ gatherings.

list.name: Automatic Mahjong Table
list.description: An automatic mahjong table for fun-filled gatherings with friends and family.

list.name: Kitchen
list.description: A kitchen with basic cooking equipment, so you can prepare your own meals.

list.name: Shared Bathrooms
list.description: Two clean, well-kept shared bathrooms serve the whole house, convenient for all guests.

intro.heading: Reservation
intro.subheading: How to book, check-in notes, and policies

steps: Confirm room type, dates, and number of guests
Pay the deposit as instructed to hold your booking
Receive booking confirmation — you're all set

notes.label: Smoking
notes.desc: Non-smoking throughout; please smoke in designated areas

notes.label: Pets
notes.desc: Pets are not allowed (please ask in advance if needed)

notes.label: Cancellation
notes.desc: Cancellation and date changes follow the policy provided at booking

booking.disclaimer: * The above is for reference; official terms follow the B&B's announcements.

items.text: Search the villa name in your navigation app; parking is available on site.
